summary: Backend API testing for Surfer Gallery Review feature completed successfully. All 26 tests passed (100%). APIs handle session entitlements, AI proposed matches, claim/dismiss operations, identity confirmation, and resolution upsell correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Code is well-structured with proper separation of concerns
All endpoints properly validate required parameters (user_id)
Entitlement logic correctly handles all three scenarios (All-Inclusive, Partial Credits, Pay-Per-Clip)
Frontend components have data-testid attributes for testing (match-card-{id}, upgrade-to-raw-badge)
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - tests use existing test user and validate API behavior with non-existent IDs
context_for_next_testing_agent: Surfer Gallery Review APIs fully tested. Backend endpoints: /api/surfer-gallery/session-entitlements/{session_id}, /api/surfer-gallery/proposed-matches/{session_id}, /api/surfer-gallery/claim-match, /api/surfer-gallery/claim-matches-batch, /api/surfer-gallery/dismiss-match, /api/surfer-gallery/confirm-identity, /api/surfer-gallery/resolution-upsell/{item_id}, /api/surfer-gallery/upgrade-resolution/{item_id}. All require user_id query param. Frontend components AIProposedMatches.js and ResolutionUpsell.js are ready but need integration testing when hooked up to real data.

tests: Returns default entitlements for unknown session
Response has correct structure with all required fields
Returns empty list for session with no matches
Returns is_paid_account flag for account tier differentiation
Logic B (Partial Credits): included_media_count, claimed_count, credits_remaining fields present and calculated correctly

backend_apis_tested./api/surfer-gallery/proposed-matches/{se: PASS - Returns matches array with is_paid_account flag
backend_apis_tested./api/surfer-gallery/claim-match: PASS - Validates match_id, session_id, use_credit in request body
backend_apis_tested./api/surfer-gallery/claim-matches-batch: PASS - Validates match_ids array, session_id, use_credits
backend_apis_tested./api/surfer-gallery/dismiss-match: PASS - Requires match_id, session_id, user_id query params
backend_apis_tested./api/surfer-gallery/confirm-identity: PASS - Validates match_id, is_confirmed in request body
backend_apis_tested./api/surfer-gallery/resolution-upsell/{i: PASS - Returns upgrade_available, upgrade_price, current/target tier info
backend_apis_tested./api/surfer-gallery/upgrade-resolution/{: PASS - Processes upgrade and returns new_tier, amount_charged
